text.title: User Story Mapping Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from personas to validated map.

step.name: extract-journey
step.action: Synthesize 4-8 top-level activities ordered along the user journey.
step.decision-gate: If activities > 8 OR generic ("Features"), split or rewrite.

step.name: decompose-tasks
step.action: Per activity, list tasks the persona must perform.

step.name: seed-stories
step.action: Attach existing or new stories to tasks, tagged with persona_id.

step.name: slice-r1
step.action: Pick the thinnest end-to-end slice: ≥1 story per activity marked release=R1. Remaining stories spread R2-R4.
step.decision-gate: If any activity lacks R1 story, return to step 3.

step.name: validate-and-commit
step.action: Run validator. Commit to git. Render Markdown + Mermaid + Miro views from YAML.
